question: Process scoring shape: per-trial absolute rubric scores (anchored 1-5 scales) or comparative A-vs-B preference on transcripts?
author: claude/design

question: Scorers: LLM judge on all trials calibrated against human scores on the reviewed sample, or human-only?
author: claude/design

question: v1 rubric dimensions: planning quality, exploration efficiency, error recovery, instruction adherence, destructive-action caution?
author: claude/design

question: Transcript length policy: full transcript in judge context or CANT_SCORE (no silent truncation), vs recorded truncation policy?
author: claude/design

question: PR-5: wire bench process score and surface AC-5/AC-7 reporting (kappa, correlations, style_only) in analyze?
rationale: bench process score drives the isolated judge path score_trial_process over trial transcripts (its docstring already documents score; only record was registered). process_kappa_by_dimension + score_telemetry_correlation (zero production callers) are wired over the 4B reviewed sample; the analyze process section and render surface per-dimension weighted kappa, score-vs-telemetry correlations, and the style_only flag (carry none today though plan M5 requires them). Reuses the existing 'process' entrypoint (process_score event unchanged). Implementation: Phase 4 slice 4D.
author: jyang
